headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks are big title favorites after taking 2-0 lead on Spurs
headlines.description: The Knicks' incredible playoff run continues, as they are up 2-0 on the Spurs and head to New York as big championship favorites.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Important plays, lessons from Knicks-Spurs Game 2
headlines.description: Is it time to panic for San Antonio? Let's break down Knicks-Spurs Game 2 from all angles, then look ahead to a massive Game 3 in New York.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA Finals: Biggest takeaways from Knicks-Spurs Game 2
headlines.description: NBA insiders break down the biggest takeaways from Game 2 of the NBA Finals and look ahead to the rest of the Knicks-Spurs showdown.

headlines.headline: Salesian Sisters are divine force behind Spurs' NBA Finals hopes
headlines.description: A group of Catholic sisters have gone viral for their decades-long dedication to their hometown team. If their prayers are answered, the Wemby Era will begin with a Spurs win.

headlines.headline: Wemby rues costly turnover as Spurs fall in Game 2 of NBA Finals
headlines.description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama admitted urgency got the better of him when he committed a late turnover in Friday's Game 2 loss, but he said he would use the frustration as fuel for the next game.

headlines.headline: Mike Brown suggests country music helped Mitchell Robinson guard Wemby

headlines.headline: Lacking a star, Cowboys lean on depth for their pass rush
headlines.description: With the likes of Myles Garrett out of the picture, Dallas will lean on Rashan Gary and Malachi Lawrence in 2026.

headlines.headline: Nico Collins' raise puts Texans' WR in line with booming market
headlines.description: Shortly after Collins signed an extension in 2024, the NFL quickly began to rewrite the WR market.

headlines.headline: Chiefs banking on Xavier Worthy, young WR group to improve
headlines.description: Chiefs coach Andy Reid's biggest assistant hire this offseason might be his new receivers coach, Chad O'Shea.

headlines.headline: How Ravens OC Declan Doyle can reboot Baltimore offense
headlines.description: Doyle, 30, is taking over a Baltimore offense that dropped to No. 16 in total yards after years of success.

headlines.headline: Lightning's Andrei Vasilevskiy wins Vezina Trophy for 2nd time
headlines.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning's Andrei Vasilevskiy has won the Vezina Trophy, the second time he's been named the NHL's top goaltender.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: The setting has shifted to Vegas for Games 3 and 4 with the series tied 1-1.

headlines.headline: NHL Stanley Pup 2026: How to watch, schedule, more
headlines.description: The third annual Stanley Pup premieres Monday at 8 p.m. ET in Canada and 9:30 p.m. ET in the United States.

headlines.headline: NHL exec Cliff Fletcher, who built Flames into winner, dies at 90
headlines.description: NHL executive Cliff Fletcher, who led the Flames to a Stanley Cup championship in 1989 and helped turn Toronto into a contender while earning the nickname "Trader Cliff" for his skillful wheeling and dealing, has died at 90.

headlines.headline: Auston Matthews still wants to win in Toronto, GM says
headlines.description: Maple Leafs general manager John Chayka says he isn't concerned that team captain Auston Matthews is searching for an exit from Toronto.
